stealth_missions.name: Corporate Infiltration
stealth_missions.description: Infiltrate a corporate facility to steal sensitive data without raising the alarm.

objectives.success_condition: Reach server room and spend 1 action downloading data
objectives.failure_condition: Alarm level reaches 5 or all crew detected

objectives.success_condition: At least one crew member with data reaches extraction
objectives.failure_condition: All crew members eliminated or captured

special_rules: Detection System: Each visible crew member adds +1 to alarm level per round
Patrol Routes: Security moves in predictable patterns
Noise Discipline: Gunfire automatically raises alarm by +2

alarm_effects.effect: Full lockdown - mission fails if not complete in 3 rounds

detection_rules.line_of_sight_checks: Guards check LOS at start of each activation
detection_rules.cover_bonuses: Full cover = invisible, Partial cover = -2 to detection roll
detection_rules.detection_roll: Guard rolls 1D6+Savvy vs crew member Savvy. Guard wins = detected
detection_rules.noise_penalties: Running = -1 to avoid detection, Shooting = automatic detection

stealth_missions.name: Warehouse Heist
stealth_missions.description: Break into a warehouse and steal valuable cargo without alerting the guards.

objectives.success_condition: Secure cargo from at least 2 locations
objectives.failure_condition: Alarm reaches maximum before securing cargo

special_rules: Multiple Entry Points: Crew can split up
Cargo Weight: Carrying cargo reduces Speed by 2"
Guard Dogs: Some guards have detection bonus

salvage_jobs.name: Derelict Ship Salvage
salvage_jobs.description: Explore an abandoned ship and salvage valuable equipment before something finds you.

objectives.success_condition: Search at least 3 compartments and extract
objectives.failure_condition: Tension reaches 10 or all crew eliminated

special_rules: Tension Meter: Starts at 0, increases through events
Random Encounters: Roll on encounter table when tension increases
Salvage Discovery: Find loot in compartments

tension_effects.effect: Hostile force arrives, add +4 deployment points
Mission becomes untenable - must extract within 3 rounds

minor_encounters: Unstable flooring - 1D3 crew must make Reactions check or take 1 damage
Scavenger rats - Lose 1 random piece of equipment
Automated security - Single security bot appears
Toxic gas leak - All crew in area take Toughness check or 1 damage
Malfunctioning door - One door seals, must find alternate route
major_encounters: Nest of creatures - 2D6 small hostile creatures
Hull breach - Explosive decompression, all crew moved 1D6" randomly
Powered armor remains - 1 Assault Bot activates
Ship AI awakens - Environmental hazards increase

salvage_discoveries.find: Roll twice on Loot table and add +1 story point

salvage_jobs.name: Ancient Ruins Exploration
salvage_jobs.description: Explore pre-Unity ruins and recover ancient artifacts.

objectives.success_condition: Explore at least half of locations

special_rules: Archaeological Care: Rushing increases tension by +1
Ancient Traps: Some areas have traps (Reactions check to avoid)
Valuable Finds: Higher risk areas have better loot

street_fights.name: Gang Turf War
street_fights.description: Caught in a violent gang conflict in the city streets.

objectives.target: Last 5 rounds or eliminate all gang members

special_rules: Civilian Hazard: 1D6 civilians on board, hitting them causes problems
Urban Cover: Abundant cover but restricts movement
Reinforcements: Each side may get reinforcements mid-battle

civilian_rules.civilian_behavior: Move randomly 1D6" each round toward nearest cover
civilian_rules.hitting_civilians: If crew hits civilian, gain Rival and lose 1D3 story points
civilian_rules.civilian_casualties: Gang members don't care about hitting civilians

environmental_hazards: Burning vehicle: 2" radius deals 1 damage per round
Unstable building: Collapses after 1D6 rounds if fighting near it
Traffic: Vehicles may drive through battlefield (1D6 damage if hit)
Police sirens: After round 5, roll 1D6 each round. On 6, police arrive and battle ends

street_fights.name: Protest Gone Wrong
street_fights.description: A peaceful protest turned violent. Extract civilians while fighting off aggressive security forces.

objectives.success_condition: At least half of civilian leaders survive and extracted

special_rules: Crowd Control: Enemies use non-lethal weapons initially
Escalation: After round 3, enemies switch to lethal force
Media Present: Success gives +2 story points, failure loses -1

expanded_opportunities.name: High-Value Transport
expanded_opportunities.description: A connection needs valuable cargo transported safely across hostile territory.

special_rules: Convoy Movement: Cargo vehicle moves 4" per round
Ambush: Enemies may appear from multiple directions
Cargo Damage: If cargo takes 3+ hits, it's destroyed

connection_benefits.critical_success: Bonus: Free equipment worth up to 10 credits
